author: Genshin Impact
text:
"The Final Gift" Animated Short | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #Sandrone #TheFinalGift
Here lies
Alain Guillotin
Founding Director of the Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering
White Cavalier of Protection
Lord-Artificer

May the waters protect his soul
May he be troubled by suffering no more
May the waters guide his soul
Safely across to the other shore

"Regrettably, there's nothing more to say."

VA:
"The Damselette" Columbina — Emi Lo
"Marionette" Sandrone — Deneen Melody
Alain Guillotin — David Lambert
"The Jester" Pierro — Richard Tatum
"The Knave" Arlecchino — Erin Yvette
"The Fair Lady" Signora — Anonymous
"Regrator" Pantalone — J. Michael Tatum
"The Doctor" Il Dottore — Mick Wingert
"Childe" Tartaglia — Griffin Burns

Chinese Voice-Over Video: https://youtu.be/ioxQ6q_YJEg
Japanese Voice-Over Video: https://youtu.be/FRhHK_d6tD8
